programme.title: Come Alive
programme.desc: What would our world look like if more churches followed the example Jesus gave us to serve the poor and needy? The heartwarming story of the Christian Care Centre will challenge pastors, church planters, and church members alike.

programme.title: Power for Living
programme.desc: Powerful words from Evangelist and Pastor Bill Newman.

programme.title: GGC Life TV
programme.sub-title: The World Outside Your Window Pt-1
programme.desc: With a vision for a church that is life-changing and uplifting, Glorious Gospel Church and their values are based firmly in the bible.

programme.title: Impact for Life
programme.sub-title: Don't Lose Sight of The Ark
programme.desc: Pastor Bev Mortlock preaches on what it is to not lose sight of the Ark and to leave our limitation at the cross. Because of this, we are able to move forward without any limitation or restriction on our lives.

programme.title: Life with Paul De Jong
programme.desc: We like to call it 'soul food'. This program uses creative illustration, real life stories and biblical teaching to encourage and help viewers discover a greater purpose to their lives.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.desc: Betrayal can wreck the lives of both the betrayer and the betrayed. The envy of Joseph's brothers led them to do horrible things, but God was at work in the life of Joseph.

programme.title: In Touch
programme.desc: Tackling important life issues such as personal crises and relationships, Dr Stanley fervently believes the Bible to be the inerrant Word of God, a belief strongly reflected in his teaching.

programme.title: Answers with Bayless Conley
programme.sub-title: The Lord Is My Shepherd Part 1
programme.desc: In part one of his message The Lord Is My Shepherd, Pastor Bayless looks at Psalm 23, explaining the deep care your Good Shepherd provides you.

programme.title: Elevation Experience
programme.desc: The Elevation Experience with Pastor Steven Furtick features inspirational messages from Pastor Steven as well as original worship music from Elevation Church in Charlotte, North Carolina.

programme.title: PowerPoint with Jack Graham
programme.desc: A vision of Dr Jack Graham to glorify God by introducing Jesus Christ as Lord to as many people as possible and to develop them in Christian living.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Direct from Houston, Texas, join Joel and Victoria Osteen and the team from Lakewood Church for a session of powerful music and empowering preaching.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Katherine Ruonala Ministries
programme.desc: What is the Kingdom of God? My daughter, Emily Ruonala, takes a deep dive to uncover the truth about what this really means for our lives.

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin
programme.sub-title: How to Redeem Your Family Name Series - Part 1
programme.desc: Pastor Jentezen Franklin, brings meaning to spiritual truths found in God's Word. Kingdom Connection is the teaching ministry of Free Chapel, a multi-campus church.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: What does the Bible say about spiritual gifts and the leadership of the Holy Spirit in our lives? Joyce and Ginger talk candidly about the supernatural.

programme.title: John Wesley - The Man and His Mission
programme.desc: Keith Garner visits historical locations, elegant chapels and bustling city centres as he discovers the impact of the work of John Wesley, 200 years after his death.

programme.title: Red Dust Challenge
programme.desc: A team of experienced disaster response volunteers, powered by mateship and determination, ride bicycles across the Simpson Desert to raise money for Australian charity Global Care, while lockdowns threaten to derail their adventure.

programme.title: You're Bacon Me Crazy
programme.desc: Aspiring Portland chef Cleo Morelli tries to win a food-truck competition while the competition tries to win her heart.

programme.title: To the Moon and Back
programme.desc: The Postables embark on a road trip to locate a talented young singer/songwriter hiding from her past. As they track down and reunite the family, Oliver receives a box of letters from his father to help prepare him.

programme.title: Compassion Stories
programme.desc: Follow powerful stories highlighting the transformative work of the Compassion Child Sponsorship Program in Africa, South America, India and Asia.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: The Catholic Guy
programme.sub-title: Defining The Path to Deeper Holiness (2)
programme.desc: Bruce Downes is the Catholic Guy. His presentations will uplift, inform and challenge you to move to higher level of faith and life.

programme.title: Songs of Praise
programme.desc: Sally Magnusson meets local hero George Parsonage, who has saved hundreds of people from the river Clyde.

programme.title: Moonrise
programme.desc: A country singer and his family learn how to live life again after his wife passes away.

programme.title: Hour of Power
programme.desc: Bobby Schuller provides principles and practices that can help people become happy students of Jesus and live a life of meaning believing there is no fuller, richer life than the one that is lived in Christ.

programme.title: Life with Paul De Jong
programme.desc: We like to call it 'soul food'. This program uses creative illustration, real life stories and biblical teaching to encourage and help viewers discover a greater purpose to their lives.

programme.title: Answers with Bayless Conley
programme.sub-title: The Lord Is My Shepherd Part 1
programme.desc: In part one of his message The Lord Is My Shepherd, Pastor Bayless looks at Psalm 23, explaining the deep care your Good Shepherd provides you.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.sub-title: When It Rains, It Pours - Part 1
programme.desc: Feeling overwhelmed by challenges? Today, Joyce, Ginger, Erin, and Holly Wagner share life-changing lessons to help you endure tough times and find hope on the other side.

programme.title: Songs of Praise
programme.desc: Sally Magnusson meets local hero George Parsonage, who has saved hundreds of people from the river Clyde.

programme.title: Moonrise
programme.desc: A country singer and his family learn how to live life again after his wife passes away.

programme.title: Harriet Tubman: They Called Her Moses
programme.desc: Discover the real Harriet Tubman in this compelling documentary. Narrated by Alfrelynn Roberts it features expert interviews and remarkable early 20th century audio recordings of African-American spirituals sung by former slaves.

programme.title: Praise, Prayer and Preaching
programme.sub-title: Back To The City In A Hurry
programme.desc: Teaching at Wesley Mission Sydney is the Sunday night experience in the Wesley Theatre. Be part of the weekly service with Rev Keith Garner as he shares with his congregation a message from the bible.

programme.title: Love at First Bark
programme.desc: Portland interior designer Julia Galvins adopts a dog and seeks the help of expert and handsome dog trainer Owen Michaels.

programme.title: Godzilla x Kong: The New Empire
programme.desc: Godzilla and the almighty Kong face a colossal threat hidden deep within the planet, challenging their very existence and the survival of the human race.

programme.title: Aquaman and the Lost Kingdom
programme.desc: Seeking revenge for his father's death, Black Manta uses the Black Trident's power to become a formidable foe. To defend Atlantis, Aquaman must forge an alliance with his imprisoned brother.

programme.title: The Fall Guy
programme.desc: A down-and-out stuntman must find the missing star of his ex-girlfriend's blockbuster film.

programme.title: Good Luck To You, Leo Grande
programme.desc: Retired teacher, Nancy, embarks on a post-marital sexual awakening with sex worker, Leo who draws on all his skills and charm, and together they find a surprising human connection.

programme.title: Flight 149: Hostage of War
programme.desc: In 1990, Iraq takes the world by surprise and invades Kuwait. BA Flight 149 from London lands in Kuwait for a scheduled stop with men, women and children aboard. The plane never reaches its final destination.

programme.title: Emilia Perez
programme.desc: Follows four women in Mexico chasing happiness. Cartel leader Emilia recruits lawyer Rita to fake her death and live authentically as her true self.

programme.title: The Beast Within
programme.desc: After witnessing her father undergo a terrible transformation, a 10-year-old girl becomes ensnared by the dark ancestral secret that her parents have so desperately tried to conceal.

programme.title: Kraven the Hunter
programme.desc: Kraven's complex relationship with his ruthless father starts him down a path of vengeance, motivating him to become not only the greatest hunter in the world, but also one of its most feared.

programme.title: Bad Boys: Ride or Die
programme.desc: The Bad Boys are back, but this time with a twist: Miami's finest are now on the run.

programme.title: Depravity
programme.desc: Friends find themselves on a dangerous path as they try to cover up the death of an innocent man.

programme.title: A Quiet Place: Day One
programme.desc: A young woman named Sam finds herself trapped in New York City during the early stages of an invasion by alien creatures with ultra-sensitive hearing.

programme.title: Relax, I'm from the Future
programme.desc: Casper, a time traveller, arrives in the present with a habit of meeting people he knows are about to die and confessing the truth about himself.

programme.title: Greedy People
programme.desc: Residents of a small island town navigate a murder and the discovery of a million dollars, a series of increasingly bad decisions upend the once peaceful community.

programme.title: Blues Brothers 2000
programme.desc: Sequel to the 1980 cult classic, Jake and Elwood must reunite the old band, with a few new members, and go on another "Mission from God".

programme.title: Wicked
programme.desc: In Oz, two clashing witches, Elphaba and Glinda, form an unlikely friendship. Elphaba, wrongly labeled wicked, seeks to expose the corrupt Wizard ruling the land.

programme.title: Sing
programme.desc: A dapper koala who has fallen on hard times has one final chance to restore his crumbling theatre by producing the world's greatest singing competition.

programme.title: The Bodyguard
programme.desc: A bodyguard is sent to protect a pop-music diva from a homicidal fan. At first repelled by each other, passion ignites as danger explodes around them.

programme.title: Flashdance
programme.desc: Alex bravely fights her way out of the welding gear, off the stripper pole, and onto the dance school floor.

programme.title: Mean Girls (2024)
programme.desc: In a musical twist of the cult classic, new student Cady Heron is welcomed by the popular girls called The Plastics. However, Cady falls for queen bee Regina's ex-boyfriend.

programme.title: Mamma Mia! Here We Go Again
programme.desc: A decade after Mamma Mia! sang and danced its way into the hearts of audiences around the world, the original cast are back.

programme.title: Wonka
programme.desc: A young Willy Wonka, chock-full of ideas and determined to change the world one bite at a time, proves that the best things in life begin with a dream.

programme.title: Unsung Hero
programme.desc: Based on a remarkable true story, a mother's faith stands against all odds and inspires her husband and children to hold on to theirs.

programme.title: Pitch Perfect
programme.desc: Beca, a freshman at her new college, finds herself muscled into a clique whose only thing in common is how good they sound when they sing together in perfect harmony in this laugh-out-loud comedy.

programme.title: 8 Mile
programme.desc: For Jimmy Smith Jr, life is a daily fight just to keep hope alive.

programme.title: Yesterday
programme.desc: After a freak accident, struggling singer-songwriter Jack realises he's the only person on Earth who remembers The Beatles. Performing their classics, he skyrockets to fame.

programme.title: Almost Famous
programme.desc: A coming-of-age story about an aspiring teenage writer who, ignoring the advice of his mother, goes on the road with an almost famous band in the '70s.

programme.title: The Prince of Egypt
programme.desc: This is the extraordinary tale of two brothers, one born of royal blood, one an orphan with a secret past. Their final confrontation will forever change their lives - and the world.

programme.title: Daddy Day Camp
programme.desc: When the dads expand their childcare magic to Camp Driftwood, they discover the camp has everything it needs, except a plan to put the bullies of rival Camp Canola to shame.

programme.title: Cloudy With a Chance of Meatballs
programme.desc: A local scientist is often regarded as a failure until he invents a machine that can make food fall from the sky. But little does he know, things are about to take a turn for the worse.

programme.title: Arthur Christmas
programme.desc: On Christmas night at the North Pole, Santa's youngest son looks to use his father's high-tech operation for an urgent mission.

programme.title: The Boss Baby
programme.desc: A seven-year-old's life is changed forever with the arrival of a suit-wearing, briefcase-carrying baby: his new baby brother.

programme.title: Rise of the Guardians
programme.desc: When the evil spirit Pitch launches an assault on Earth, the immortal Guardians must join forces for the first time to protect the hopes, beliefs and imagination of children all over the world.

programme.title: Chicken Run
programme.desc: A smooth-talking rooster crash-lands into a farm and attempts to help a group of chickens escape. With teamwork and a little bit of cluck, the fearless flock plots one last daring attempt for freedom.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse
programme.desc: Brooklyn teen Miles Morales is introduced to the limitless possibilities of the Spider-Verse, where more than one can wear the mask.

programme.title: The Grinch
programme.desc: A cynical grump goes on a mission to steal Christmas, only to have his heart changed by a young girl's generous holiday spirit.

programme.title: The Croods
programme.desc: The story of the world's first family road trip. After their cave is destroyed, the Crood family must embark on a comedy adventure into strange and spectacular territory in search of a new home.

programme.title: The Croods: A New Age
programme.desc: In search of a new home, the Croods encounter the more sophisticated Betterman family. A new threat forces the two families to set aside their differences to avoid extinction.

programme.title: Shark Tale
programme.desc: Oscar is a fast-talking little fish whose big dreams have a habit of landing him in hot water. Lenny is a great white shark with a sensitive side and a secret: he's a vegetarian.

programme.title: Combat Wombat: Back 2 Back
programme.desc: An evil tech genius threatens to turn the city into a metaverse simulation, leaving the Combat Wombat to save the day.

programme.title: How the Grinch Stole Christmas
programme.desc: He's mean and green and he hates the yo-ho-hoing. The Grinch conspires to steal Christmas from Whoville, making off with the presents, decorations, trees and every other joyful thing.

programme.title: Hook
programme.desc: A lawyer who has lost any memory that he was once the legendary Peter Pan must travel to Neverland, aided by Tinker Bell, to rescue his children from his nemesis, Captain Hook.

programme.title: Snow White and the Huntsman
programme.desc: In a twist to the fairy tale, the evil Queen Ravenna orders the Huntsman to capture Snow White so she can rule eternally; however, he trains her in the art of war to defeat the wicked ruler.

programme.title: The Prestige
programme.desc: A mysterious story of two magicians whose intense rivalry leads them on a life-long battle for supremacy.

programme.title: The Forever Purge
programme.desc: The Purge reaches a boiling point as the violence spills over into a never-ending onslaught, and a Hispanic couple flee south to Mexico with the aid of a white rancher family.

programme.title: The Fate of the Furious
programme.desc: When a woman seduces Dom into the world of crime, the crew face trials that will test them like never before.

programme.title: The Punisher
programme.desc: An undercover FBI agent is crushed when his wife and children are killed after witnessing a mafia hit. With nothing left to live for he becomes The Punisher, a one-man judge, jury, and executioner.

programme.title: King Kong (2005)
programme.desc: The leading lady in a movie is abducted as a sacrifice for a giant ape in this jaw-dropping, triple Oscar-winning remake of the 1933 classic.

programme.title: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: An experiment with dinosaurs created from DNA becomes a disaster when sabotage sets the prehistoric monsters loose in an island theme park.

programme.title: Bastille Day
programme.desc: When a reckless CIA agent and a brilliant pickpocket uncover a large-scale conspiracy, they must work together in order to take down a common enemy.

programme.title: Batman Begins
programme.desc: Bruce Wayne returns to Gotham and unveils his alter-ego: Batman, a masked crusader who uses his strength, intellect, and high-tech deceptions to fight the sinister forces that threaten the city.

programme.title: Death Race 4: Beyond Anarchy
programme.desc: Connor Gibson, a Black Ops specialist, infiltrates a maximum security prison to enter the Death Race. A brutal world of no guards, no rules, no track, and no fear.

programme.title: F9: The Fast Saga
programme.desc: The true meaning of family gets tested like never before as Dom Toretto takes the team on a worldwide ride with high-stakes action, old friends and a surprising new foe.

programme.title: Jurassic World
programme.desc: When genetically modified dinosaurs run amok at a new themed resort, a former military man and animal expert must use his special skills to halt an all-out prehistoric slaughter.

programme.title: Hot Fuzz
programme.desc: A big-city cop is reassigned to an idyllic, quiet town. But his dull existence is interrupted by suspicious accidents.

programme.title: Little Nicky
programme.desc: When Satan refuses to retire, two of his heirs leave Hell for New York City to gather enough souls to vote the Prince of Darkness out of office.

programme.title: Paul Blart: Mall Cop 2
programme.desc: After six years of keeping New Jersey malls safe, an overzealous security guard learns that duty never rests when he heads to Las Vegas for a well-earned vacation with his teen daughter.

programme.title: The Hangover
programme.desc: When three friends wake up in a trashed Las Vegas hotel room after a bachelor party, they realise the groom is missing and must piece together the night's events - one hazy clue at a time.

programme.title: The Hangover Part II
programme.desc: Phil, Stu and their mates travel to Thailand for Stu's subdued pre-wedding brunch after the unforgettable bachelor party in Vegas. However, things don't go to plan.

programme.title: Mr. Bean's Holiday
programme.desc: Mr Bean can't believe his luck when he wins a camcorder and an all-expense paid holiday to the French Riviera. But during his journey to the south, he falls face first into a series of mishaps.

programme.title: Mr. Deeds
programme.desc: Life flips over for a small-town pizzeria owner and poet who inherits $40 billion. Sleazy moguls come to whisk him and his money away to corporate America.

programme.title: American Pie
programme.desc: Four unlucky in love friends who make a pact: lose their virginity by prom night. Manipulating their way into the hearts of some of their classmates, their plans often backfire with hilarity.

programme.title: Night School
programme.desc: A man must attend night school classes alongside a group of oddballs in order to earn his much needed diploma.

programme.title: Starsky & Hutch
programme.desc: Join uptight David Starsky and laid-back Ken 'Hutch' Hutchinson as they're paired for the first time as undercover cops and are forced overcome their differences to solve an important case.

programme.title: Ace Ventura: Pet Detective
programme.desc: A goofy pet detective is hired to track down Snowflake, the Miami Dolphins' mascot.

programme.title: Ace Ventura: When Nature Calls
programme.desc: Africa's the place, and Ace is on the case of the missing rare white bat, returning as the alligator-wrestlin', elephant-callin', all-round amazing pet detective.

programme.title: Mr. Bean's Holiday
programme.desc: Mr Bean can't believe his luck when he wins a camcorder and an all-expense paid holiday to the French Riviera. But during his journey to the south, he falls face first into a series of mishaps.

programme.title: Forgetting Sarah Marshall
programme.desc: A struggling musician escapes to Hawaii on a vacation after he is jilted by his television star girlfriend Sarah for another guy, only to find his ex staying in the same hotel with her new man.

programme.title: Mr. Deeds
programme.desc: Life flips over for a small-town pizzeria owner and poet who inherits $40 billion. Sleazy moguls come to whisk him and his money away to corporate America.

programme.title: Pineapple Express
programme.desc: A pothead who sees a crooked cop committing a murder goes on the run with his dealer.

programme.title: Mickey Blue Eyes
programme.desc: An Englishman learns that his fiance is the daughter of a mafia kingpin, and hilarity ensues as he adopts the Mafioso life.

programme.title: Notting Hill
programme.desc: Anna, the world's most famous movie star, and William, a stagnant business owner, cross paths and fall in love. But can two people fall in love with the whole world watching?

programme.title: Sabrina
programme.desc: The daughter of a wealthy family's chauffeur falls in love with one of their sons.

programme.title: The Holiday
programme.desc: Iris is in love with a man who is about to marry another woman. Across the globe, Amanda realises that the man she lives with has been unfaithful.

programme.title: Playing Cupid
programme.desc: A girl sets her single father up with her teacher after starting a matchmaking business for a school project.

programme.title: The Boy Next Door
programme.desc: A newly separated teacher gives in to temptation when the handsome teenager next door attempts to seduce her. But trouble ensues when she tries to end the relationship.

programme.title: Sense and Sensibility
programme.desc: Based on Jane Austen's classic novel, this tells of the Dashwood sisters whose chances at marriage seem doomed by their family's sudden loss of fortune.

programme.title: Love Actually
programme.desc: Love's causing chaos all over London. Even the PM is smitten. Ten separate stories intertwine in a Christmas Eve climax.

programme.title: Duplicity
programme.desc: Two sexy spies-turned-corporate operatives find themselves on either side of an all-out corporate war, even though they are having an affair.

programme.title: Last Christmas
programme.desc: Featuring the music of George Michael, this film follows a hapless Londoner who works in a Christmas shop and becomes involved with a man who could be the answer to her problems.

programme.title: Playing Cupid
programme.desc: A girl sets her single father up with her teacher after starting a matchmaking business for a school project.

programme.title: The Boy Next Door
programme.desc: A newly separated teacher gives in to temptation when the handsome teenager next door attempts to seduce her. But trouble ensues when she tries to end the relationship.

programme.title: Dream Horse
programme.desc: The inspirational true story of Jan Vokes, a Welsh cleaner and bartender, who decides to breed and raise a racehorse.

programme.title: Snatch
programme.desc: Crooked boxing promoters, violent bookies, a Russian gangster, incompetent robbers, and suss jewellers fight over a priceless stolen diamond.

programme.title: Lion
programme.desc: A young Indian boy gets lost on the streets of Calcutta, miles from home. He is eventually adopted by an Australian couple, but years later he sets out to find his lost family.

programme.title: The Taking of Pelham 1 2 3
programme.desc: A New York City subway dispatcher's ordinary day is thrown into chaos by an audacious crime: the hijacking of a subway train buy a criminal mastermind.

programme.title: Inglourious Basterds
programme.desc: As war rages in Europe, a Nazi-scalping squad of American soldiers, known to their enemy as The Basterds, is on a daring mission to take down the leaders of the Third Reich.

programme.title: Cat Person
programme.desc: When Margot, a college sophomore, goes on a date with the older Robert, she finds that IRL Robert doesn't live up to the Robert she has been flirting with over texts.

programme.title: Being John Malkovich
programme.desc: A depressed Craig Schwartz sells tickets to people so they can enter a portal into actor John Malkovich's mind.

programme.title: Minority Report
programme.desc: In the year 2054, the head of a police unit specialising in pre-crime - the arrest and conviction of murderers before they commit their crime - finds himself accused of a future murder.

programme.title: Fury
programme.desc: On a deadly mission behind enemy lines a wily WWII sergeant, his loyal Sherman tank crew and a rookie soldier find themselves hopelessly outnumbered.

programme.title: The Town
programme.desc: A bank robber falls in love with a former robbery hostage and decides he wants out of the life. With the Feds closing in he must choose: betray his friends or lose the woman he loves.

programme.title: Inglourious Basterds
programme.desc: As war rages in Europe, a Nazi-scalping squad of American soldiers, known to their enemy as The Basterds, is on a daring mission to take down the leaders of the Third Reich.

programme.title: Being John Malkovich
programme.desc: A depressed Craig Schwartz sells tickets to people so they can enter a portal into actor John Malkovich's mind.

programme.title: Jaws
programme.desc: The thriller that scared movie fans everywhere out of the water. Three men undertake a perilous journey to hunt down a great white killer shark.

programme.title: Robin Hood: Prince of Thieves
programme.desc: Robin vows to avenge his father's death when he is murdered by the Sheriff of Nottingham.

programme.title: The Blues Brothers
programme.desc: The orphanage where Jake and Elwood were raised will be sold unless the tax on the property is paid within days. The brothers decide to raise the money by putting their band back together.

programme.title: Blues Brothers 2000
programme.desc: Sequel to the 1980 cult classic, Jake and Elwood must reunite the old band, with a few new members, and go on another "Mission from God".

programme.title: Foul Play
programme.desc: This bizarre, Hitchcockian comedy sees a kooky divorcee and a bumbling Federal agent take on a posse of Hollywood weirdos planning to assassinate the Pope.

programme.title: Dead Calm
programme.desc: A couple rescues a half-delirious sole survivor of a crippled schooner, but soon the stranger will plunge the unwary pair into an intense battle of cat and mouse. And life or death.

programme.title: Jaws 2
programme.desc: Just when you thought it was safe to go back in the water, another shark terrorises the resort of Amity as it recovers from the first man-eater. Police Chief Brody returns to kill.

programme.title: Trading Places
programme.desc: A story of a down-and-out con artist who trades lifestyles with a well-to-do investor. Two wealthy power players set the wheels turning with a crazy bet and the comedy gets richer by the minute.

programme.title: The Game
programme.desc: Run by the shadowy Consumer Recreations Services, the Game never quite declares its rules or objectives, but soon Nicholas finds himself in its grasp, and his ordered life starts to fall apart.

programme.title: Lethal Weapon
programme.desc: A veteran cop gets a suicidal partner. They have one thing in common: they hate working in pairs. But if these two can stand each other, the bad guys don't stand a chance.

programme.title: Foul Play
programme.desc: This bizarre, Hitchcockian comedy sees a kooky divorcee and a bumbling Federal agent take on a posse of Hollywood weirdos planning to assassinate the Pope.

programme.title: Dead Calm
programme.desc: A couple rescues a half-delirious sole survivor of a crippled schooner, but soon the stranger will plunge the unwary pair into an intense battle of cat and mouse. And life or death.

programme.title: Jaws 2
programme.desc: Just when you thought it was safe to go back in the water, another shark terrorises the resort of Amity as it recovers from the first man-eater. Police Chief Brody returns to kill.

programme.title: Boy In The Attic
programme.desc: A teen girl falls in love with the boy who's been hiding in the attic of her family's new home. When she learns that he's been accused of murder, she must make a tough decision.

programme.title: Wrath: A Seven Deadly Sins Story
programme.desc: Single lawyer Chastity Jeffries believes she's found her perfect match in Xavier Collins, but his obsessive love forces her to confront how far she's strayed from her own principles.

programme.title: Single Black Female 3: The Final Chapter
programme.desc: Monica is proven innocent after being wrongfully arrested for murder. As charges are dropped, the police shift focus to Simone, who has vanished while bonding with her daughter Joy.

programme.title: A Deadly Threat to My Family
programme.desc: Marielle becomes suspicious when her sister-in-law escapes from a cult and seeks refuge at her home. When another cult member shows up on her doorstep, she fears her daughter is their next target.

programme.title: Don't Scream, It's Me
programme.desc: Fifteen years ago, Liz's ex-boyfriend, Drew, is caught robbing a bank. Now, he's in her backyard, asking her to hide him after a prison escape.

programme.title: Stalked by My Amish Boyfriend
programme.desc: Carly develops a relationship with Abram, a young Amish man. Their seemingly innocent courtship soon takes a dark turn when Abram refuses to return home.

programme.title: Playing with Fire
programme.desc: After a near-fatal house fire, Natalie and Loughlin, a struggling married couple, are manipulated by an obsessive firefighter named Jack, who schemes to pit the couple against each other.

programme.title: Match, Meet, Murder
programme.desc: A lingerie designer meets a handsome stranger who's smart, successful, and a former contestant on a dating show. However, she soon learns that the show wasn't the only secret he failed to mention.

programme.title: My Nightmare Office Affair
programme.desc: Nick is a successful executive with a picture-perfect family, loving wife and adorable daughter. His boss Lisa seduces Nick in his moment of weakness, hoping to remove his wife from the picture.

programme.title: My Amish Double Life
programme.desc: Emma is a young Amish woman who leads a double life by sneaking out to clubs to flirt and have fun. However, when she accidentally witnesses a murder, her life and community get thrown into peril.

programme.title: The Bear Lake Murders
programme.desc: A sheriff teams up with a detective to uncover the truth behind a series of annual deaths in a resort town. Their investigation leads them to believe that a killer is preying on holidaymakers.

programme.title: The Beach House Murders
programme.desc: A lonely female novelist becomes a prime suspect in a homicide after a one-night tryst with a mysterious stranger who turns up dead at her summer home.

programme.title: Nightmare in the Desert
programme.desc: After returning to her childhood home, someone secretly tracks an outdoor enthusiast and her urbanite boyfriend through the desert.

programme.title: Your Boyfriend Is Mine
programme.desc: Over the objection of his girlfriend, Ben agrees to take a job as the live-in manservant to a wealthy businesswoman, Amanda, but quickly realises he has made a deal with the devil.

programme.title: Envy: A Seven Deadly Sins Story
programme.desc: Gabrielle Flores has it all: a devoted husband, a beautiful daughter, and one of the best PR firms in the country.

programme.title: Nightmare Tenant
programme.desc: A single mum takes her daughter's advice and lets out her spare room to a student in need. But the consequences are deadly.

programme.title: Road Trip Hostage
programme.desc: A deranged criminal forces a young woman to drive him across the country.

programme.title: On a Clear Day
programme.desc: A laid-off Glasgow shipbuilder strives to regain his pride after decades on the docks. Without his family's help, he attempts the ultimate test of endurance-swimming the English Channel.

programme.title: The Bookshop
programme.desc: Set in a small town in 1959 England, a woman decides, against polite but ruthless local opposition, to open a bookshop, a decision which becomes a political minefield.

programme.title: Madame Bovary
programme.desc: Trapped in a loveless marriage and eager for excitement, a doctor's wife seeks love and fulfilment outside the bonds of matrimony.

programme.title: Freight
programme.desc: A Russian gang in the UK traffic eastern European people and then enslave them, the women to sex, the men to illegal fights. They cross a local businessman, and a war escalates.

programme.title: Route Irish
programme.desc: A security contractor in Iraq rejects the official explanation of his friend's death and decides to investigate.

programme.title: Bright Young Things
programme.desc: A look at the upper crust British society during the frenzied 1930s and follows the lives of young socialites known as the 'Bright Young Things'.

programme.title: The Limehouse Golem
programme.desc: When a series of brutal murders occur in London, the community believes that a legendary dark creature must be responsible.

programme.title: Six Minutes to Midnight
programme.desc: Seventeen days before WWII, a teacher must try to exonerate himself in time to save the hearts and minds of his students from the grip of Hitler.

programme.title: Le Week-End
programme.desc: A long-married couple revisit Paris for a long weekend for the first time since their honeymoon, in hopes of rekindling their relationship - or, perhaps, to bring it to an end.

programme.title: The Happy Prince
programme.desc: After being imprisoned in England for his love affair with Lord Alfred Bosie Douglas, Oscar Wilde is penniless and in poor health, stumbling the streets of Paris.

programme.title: The Railway Man
programme.desc: The captivating, true story of a man who discovers the Japanese officer who tortured him during the war is still alive, and sets out to confront him.

programme.title: In Bruges
programme.desc: After a job goes wrong, two hit men are ordered by their crime boss to cool their heels in Bruges. They don't make good tourists and soon find themselves in the oddest of circumstances.

programme.title: Film Stars Don't Die in Liverpool
programme.desc: A vibrant affair between a legendary femme fatale and her young lover quickly grows into a deep relationship. Their passion for life is tested by events beyond their control.

programme.title: Queen of the Desert
programme.desc: A chronicle of Gertrude Bell's life, a traveller, writer, archaeologist, explorer, cartographer, and political attache for the British Empire at the dawn of the twentieth century.

programme.title: Walkabout to Hollywood
programme.desc: Exploring an Australian Aboriginal man's work to bridge the gap between his life as a film and television actor to his native cultural roots.

programme.title: Skippy
programme.desc: A swagman passing through Waratah National Park strikes up a friendship with Sonny and makes Ranger Hammond question his assumptions.

programme.title: Fatty Finn
programme.desc: Rival gangs clash in a Sydney ghetto near the end of the Depression.

programme.title: The Last Days of Chez Nous
programme.desc: An edgy look at an eccentric family from award-winning director Gillian Armstrong. A writer in crisis is faced with a foundering marriage and the return of her prodigal sister.

programme.title: Skippy
programme.desc: A swagman passing through Waratah National Park strikes up a friendship with Sonny and makes Ranger Hammond question his assumptions.

programme.title: Puberty Blues
programme.desc: Two teenage girls fall into a demeaning life of drugs and sex to serve a gang of surfies in this beach-culture classic.

programme.title: Number 96
programme.desc: The Number 96 crew return with romance, mishaps, secrets, and surprises. Vera finds love and danger, Dorrie's anniversary is rocked, and Sonia fears she's losing her mind.

programme.title: Not Quite Hollywood
programme.desc: Jam packed full of outrageous anecdotes, lessons in maverick filmmaking, a smattering of international names and a genuine, infectious love of Aussie movies.

programme.title: Suburban Mayhem
programme.desc: Dark dramatic comedy about a teenage mother whose family is destroyed when she gets away with murdering her father. Crime, sex and endless mayhem.

programme.title: Once Around the Sun
programme.desc: A look at the musical acts who performed at Australia's first rock festival, The Pilgrimage For Pop Festival, at Ourimbah in 1970.

programme.title: Skippy
programme.desc: When Sonny befriends a couple on their honeymoon in the National Park, the wife takes a real shine to Skippy. Soon it becomes clear she wants more from Skippy than friendship.

programme.title: A Town Like Alice
programme.desc: The women seek refuge in a Malay village for the duration of the war.

programme.title: The Chant of Jimmie Blacksmith
programme.desc: The true story of a part aboriginal man who finds the pressure of adapting to white culture intolerable, and as a result snaps in a violent and horrific manner.

programme.title: Rose Tattoo: Live at Boggo Road Jail '93
programme.desc: Performing here in front of a huge crowd at Boggo Road Jail in 1993, the band delivers a thumping set of seminal Oz rock, rolling out all their big hits.

programme.title: Next of Kin
programme.desc: In a rest home for elderly people, a daughter reads her mother's diary. Soon, events that are mentioned in the mother's diary begin to happen to the daughter.

programme.title: Long Weekend
programme.desc: A suburban couple's callous disregard for the environment while on a camping trip on a deserted stretch of coastline soon becomes apparent when the animals start to seek vengeance.

programme.desc: Dark dramatic comedy about a teenage mother whose family is destroyed when she gets away with murdering her father. Crime, sex and endless mayhem.

programme.title: Love at First Bark
programme.desc: Portland interior designer Julia Galvins adopts a dog and seeks the help of expert and handsome dog trainer Owen Michaels.

programme.title: Dream: Find Your Significance
programme.desc: This introduction to the documentary series Dream explores nine stories of people who have found purpose when they embraced their God-given dreams, including excerpts from the stories featured in the episodes plus more.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Live Life Above The Sun Pt 3 of 3
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Bible Man
programme.desc: Miles Peterson had everything: Money, power, fame. Until he lost it. Then Miles finds the power of God and harnesses that power to become Bibleman.

programme.title: Sea Kids
programme.desc: The Sea Kids will help transform the heart and mind of every child as they learn how to tangibly live out biblical principles and build a strong foundation in Jesus.

programme.title: Ryan Defrates: Secret Agent
programme.desc: Ryan Defrates is a young spy with a whole lot to learn. One day he's paired with a very unlikely partner - his mum!

programme.title: PowerPoint with Jack Graham
programme.desc: A vision of Dr Jack Graham to glorify God by introducing Jesus Christ as Lord to as many people as possible and to develop them in Christian living.

programme.title: The Kindness Diaries
programme.desc: Adventurer Leon Logothetis travels from Alaska to Argentina relying on the kindness of strangers and surprising unsuspecting good Samaritans with life-changing gifts!

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: Rosemary's newspaper article creates waves when she questions Lucas's judgement. Allie discusses her birth father with Nathan, and Elizabeth realises Little Jack is growing up.

programme.title: A Very Tall Man
programme.desc: Gary Hoogvliet, a very tall man, interviews interesting folk, not quite as tall as he, but nevertheless with fascinating and inspiring stories to tell.

programme.title: LIFE Church - Online
programme.desc: Join Senior Pastors Paul and Maree de Jong along with the LIFE Team for their Sunday service experience, pre-recorded from their Central Campus in Auckland, New Zealand.

programme.title: Day of Discovery
programme.desc: This weekly, documentary-style series offers a view of current and historical events, biblical prophecy, and contemporary issues of importance to those of the Christian faith.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Do you struggle with anger or strife? Today, Joyce shares how to let go of anger and how to foster unity, replacing offense with God's love and peace.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Direct from Houston, Texas, join Joel and Victoria Osteen and the team from Lakewood Church for a session of powerful music and empowering preaching.

programme.title: Songs of Praise
programme.desc: Sally Magnusson meets local hero George Parsonage, who has saved hundreds of people from the river Clyde.

programme.title: Moonrise
programme.desc: A country singer and his family learn how to live life again after his wife passes away.

programme.title: Beyond the Fire: Resilience
programme.desc: This program takes an honest look at the frustrations and triumphs on the road to recovery three years after the Black Summer bushfire crisis.

programme.title: Kids Beach Club
programme.desc: Join the Beach Club Kids as they navigate life, explore character lessons, and have a blast playing memorable games while discovering God through the pages of His Word, the Bible.

programme.title: Torchlighters: Heroes of the Faith
programme.desc: John Bunyan spends his days in prison, separated from his family. If he would agree to stop preaching, John could walk out a free man! Why does he choose to stay in jail, and how will he serve his Lord in this place?

programme.title: Ancestors: Old Testament
programme.sub-title: Adam and Eve, Noah, Abraham and Sarah
programme.desc: Discover how similar we are to our faith ancestors from the Old Testament. These animations reveal more about Bible heroes, villains, and everyday folks that God selected to do extraordinary things.

programme.title: The Catholic Guy
programme.sub-title: Defining The Path to Deeper Holiness (2)
programme.desc: Bruce Downes is the Catholic Guy. His presentations will uplift, inform and challenge you to move to higher level of faith and life.

programme.title: The Incredible Journey
programme.sub-title: Martin Luther - Man of the Millennium
programme.desc: Gary Kent is passionate about sharing the good news of Christ and preparing people for the soon coming of Jesus, offering Biblical answers to life's questions.

programme.title: Helping Hands
programme.desc: This inspiring and uplifting program facilitates conversations to empower viewers to make a positive impact in their own circles of influence.

programme.title: Destined to Ride
programme.desc: A young girl and her friend team up against two local boys on an epic horseback riding adventure in the country.

programme.title: Vindication
programme.desc: A plan is hatched to catch Chief Tomlinson while Tre conducts his own separate investigation.

programme.title: A Moment in History
programme.desc: Join host Seth Udinski as he explores the most pivotal moments in history and the Bible, providing insight into the events that have shaped our world.

programme.title: New Horizons
programme.sub-title: Life Hacks: Pocket tips from the Book of Proverbs Pt7
programme.desc: Marc explores the wisdom of the Book of Proverbs looking at the wisdom that God has provided, so that we can observe it and put it into practice in our day to day lives.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: The Power Of Right Believing Pt 1 of 3
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Bible Discovery TV
programme.desc: Hosted by the Hembree family, this is a daily devotional show where Rod, Janice, Ryan and Corie walk you through the Word in a way that will forever change how you read, learn and experience the Bible.

programme.title: Elevation Experience
programme.desc: The Elevation Experience with Pastor Steven Furtick features inspirational messages from Pastor Steven as well as original worship music from Elevation Church in Charlotte, North Carolina.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Do you struggle with anger or strife? Today, Joyce shares how to let go of anger and how to foster unity, replacing offense with God's love and peace.

programme.title: Destined to Ride
programme.desc: A young girl and her friend team up against two local boys on an epic horseback riding adventure in the country.

programme.title: Never too Late to Celebrate
programme.desc: Career-focused dentist Camila is reluctant to celebrate her 30th birthday but inspired by Javi, a Spanish teacher, the two plan a 'quinceanera' themed party to honour her Hispanic heritage.

programme.title: I Still Believe
programme.desc: One love can change your life. One life can change the world. Rediscover the wonder of love in I STILL BELIEVE, based on the real-life story of chart-topping singer Jeremy Camp.

programme.title: Greedy People
programme.desc: Residents of a small island town navigate a murder and the discovery of a million dollars, a series of increasingly bad decisions upend the once peaceful community.

programme.title: River Wild
programme.desc: A thrill-seeking trip quickly turns into a desperate fight for survival when white-water rafters become stranded in raging rapids, and someone seems intent on sabotage to ensure secrets stay buried.

programme.title: Tarot
programme.desc: Friends unwittingly unleash an unspeakable evil trapped within a cursed deck of tarot cards.

programme.title: Apartment 7A
programme.desc: New York City, 1965. What happened in the apartment before Rosemary moved in? A struggling dancer finds herself drawn into dark forces by a peculiar couple promising her fame.

programme.title: Abigail
programme.desc: A group of would-be criminals kidnaps the 12-year-old daughter of a powerful underworld figure. Their plan starts to unravel when they discover their young captive is no normal little girl.

programme.title: Speak No Evil
programme.desc: A dream holiday turns into a living nightmare when an American couple and their daughter spend the weekend at a British family's idyllic country estate.

programme.title: Monkey Man
programme.desc: A young man embarks on a quest for vengeance against the corrupt leaders who murdered his mother and continue to systemically victimise the poor and powerless.

programme.title: I.S.S.
programme.desc: Tensions flare in the near-future aboard the International Space Station as a conflict breaks out on Earth.

programme.title: Spit
programme.desc: An ex-con returns to Australia after 20 years, gets detained, faces old enemies, makes new friends, and teaches his version of mateship while staying one step ahead.

programme.title: Midas Man
programme.desc: In 1960 in Liverpool, Brian Epstein encounters a rock band who would take the world by storm.

programme.title: It Ends with Us
programme.desc: Lily overcomes a traumatic childhood to embark on a new life. A meeting with a neurosurgeon sparks a connection but Lily begins to see sides of him that remind her of her parents' relationship.

programme.title: Sumotherhood
programme.desc: Two wannabe gangsters hold up a local bank, but when things don't go according to plan, a misunderstanding leads them into business with one of East London's most notorious gangs.

programme.title: Lisa Frankenstein
programme.desc: A misunderstood teenager and a reanimated Victorian corpse embark on a murderous journey together to find love, happiness, and a few missing body parts.

programme.title: Piece by Piece
programme.desc: LEGO bricks tell the life story of singer, songwriter and record producer Pharrell Williams - from his childhood in Virginia to his success in the music and fashion industry.

programme.title: Almost Famous
programme.desc: A coming-of-age story about an aspiring teenage writer who, ignoring the advice of his mother, goes on the road with an almost famous band in the '70s.

programme.title: Piece by Piece
programme.desc: LEGO bricks tell the life story of singer, songwriter and record producer Pharrell Williams - from his childhood in Virginia to his success in the music and fashion industry.

programme.title: Mamma Mia!
programme.desc: Sophie has just one wish to make her wedding perfect: to have her father walk her down the aisle. Now she just has to find out who he is.

programme.title: Bee Gees: Broken Heart
programme.desc: An exploration of the history of the Bee Gees, featuring revealing interviews with oldest brother Barry Gibb, and archival interviews with the late twin brothers Robin and Maurice.

programme.title: Bob Marley: One Love
programme.desc: Celebrates the life of an icon who inspires generations. In this uplifting film, discover Bob Marley's story of overcoming adversity and the journey behind his revolutionary music that change the world.

programme.title: The Color Purple
programme.desc: Torn from her sister Nettie and her children, Celie faces many hardships in her life, including an abusive husband. Celie finds strength in the unbreakable bonds of sisterhood.

programme.title: Sound of Metal
programme.desc: When ex-addict Ruben unexpectedly loses his hearing his life is thrown into turmoil. In a group home for Deaf addicts, he must choose between his new community and the life of sound he left behind.

programme.title: Emilia Perez
programme.desc: Follows four women in Mexico chasing happiness. Cartel leader Emilia recruits lawyer Rita to fake her death and live authentically as her true self.

programme.title: Dear Evan Hansen
programme.desc: In this film adaptation of the Broadway phenomenon, Evan Hansen is an anxious, isolated high-schooler who aches for understanding and belonging amid the chaos and cruelty of the social media age.

programme.title: Pitch Perfect 2
programme.desc: Beca, Fat Amy and the Barden Bellas are back to pitch slap the world. After a scandal threatens to derail their last year at Barden, they worry that they've lost their harmony for good.

programme.title: The Blues Brothers
programme.desc: The orphanage where Jake and Elwood were raised will be sold unless the tax on the property is paid within days. The brothers decide to raise the money by putting their band back together.

programme.title: The Prince Of Egypt: The Musical
programme.desc: A live stage recording of the musical based on DreamWorks Animation's 1998 film adapted from the biblical story of Moses.

programme.title: Hook
programme.desc: A lawyer who has lost any memory that he was once the legendary Peter Pan must travel to Neverland, aided by Tinker Bell, to rescue his children from his nemesis, Captain Hook.

programme.title: Mr. Peabody & Sherman
programme.desc: When Mr Peabody and Sherman break the rules of time travel by meeting many of history's greatest characters, they must repair the damage they have done before it changes their world forever.

programme.title: Early Man
programme.desc: Caveman Dug, his sidekick, Hognob, and their fearless new friend, Goona, must unite their Stone Age tribe against the mighty Bronze Age enemy, Lord Nooth.

programme.title: Tom & Jerry
programme.desc: A legendary rivalry re-emerges when Jerry moves into NYC's finest hotel on the eve of the wedding of the century, forcing the desperate event planner to hire Tom to get rid of him.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: When the evil wizard Gargamel chases the tiny blue Smurfs out of their village, they tumble from their magical world into New York City.

programme.title: Scoob!
programme.desc: With hundreds of cases solved and adventures shared, Scooby and the gang face their most challenging mystery ever: a plot to unleash the ghost dog Cerberus upon the world.

programme.title: E.T. the Extra-Terrestrial
programme.desc: An extraterrestrial finds a friend in 10-year-old Elliot, while members of a task force work day and night to track down the whereabouts of Earth's first visitor from outer space.

programme.title: Spirit Untamed
programme.desc: The next chapter in this beloved franchise begins as a young girl finds a connection to her mother's legacy as a trick rider and forms a bond with a wild mustang named Spirit.

programme.title: Matilda
programme.desc: A wonderful little girl who happens to be a genius, along with her understanding teacher, outwit the worst parents and the worst school principal imaginable.

programme.title: The Pirates Who Don't Do Anything
programme.desc: Those vege-eating boys are back! This time they're cabin boys in a pirate theatre and are called upon to put aside their lazy, cowardly ways and help a princess rescue her brother who's been kidnapped.

programme.title: Journey 2: The Mysterious Island
programme.desc: The journey begins when young adventurer Sean receives a coded distress signal from a mysterious island where no island should exist.

programme.title: The Secret Garden (2020)
programme.desc: When Mary's parents suddenly die, she's sent to live with her uncle on his remote country estate deep in the Yorkshire moors. While exploring, she discovers a hidden magical garden.

programme.title: An American Tail
programme.desc: Fievel the mouse travels from Russia to America with his family in the late 1800s to seek freedom from cat persecution.

programme.title: An American Tail: Fievel Goes West
programme.desc: Lured out west by the crafty Cat R. Waul, Fievel joins forces with famed lawdog Wylie Blurp to thwart a sinister plot to transform unsuspecting settlers into ... mouse burgers!

programme.title: Captain Underpants: The First Epic Movie
programme.desc: George and Harold are BFFs who accidentally hypnotise their principal into believing he's the hero named Captain Underpants. They must stop a new teacher who is bent on ridding the world of laughter.

programme.title: Hop
programme.desc: An egg emergency ensues when the rock 'n' roll-loving teen son of the Easter Bunny shirks his responsibility and runs away from home.

programme.title: Jurassic World
programme.desc: When genetically modified dinosaurs run amok at a new themed resort, a former military man and animal expert must use his special skills to halt an all-out prehistoric slaughter.

programme.title: The Tiger's Apprentice
programme.desc: Tom Lee discovers he is part of a long lineage of magical protectors known as the Guardians. With guidance from a mythical tiger named Hu, Tom trains to take on an evil force that threatens humanity.

programme.title: Charlie's Angels
programme.desc: When a devious mastermind embroils them in a plot to destroy individual privacy, the Angels set out to bring down the bad guys. But a revelation makes the Angels targets for assassination.

programme.title: World War Z
programme.desc: The story revolves around UN employee Gerry Lane, who travels the world in a race against time to stop a pandemic that is toppling armies and governments and threatening to decimate humanity itself.

programme.title: Bastille Day
programme.desc: When a reckless CIA agent and a brilliant pickpocket uncover a large-scale conspiracy, they must work together in order to take down a common enemy.

programme.title: Transformers: Dark of the Moon
programme.desc: An event from Earth's past threatens to ignite a war so big that the Transformers alone will not be able to save the planet.

programme.title: The Dark Knight Rises
programme.desc: It has been years since Batman vanished into the night, turning from hero to fugitive. Everything will change with the arrival of a cunning cat burglar, and the emergence of masked terrorist, Bane.

programme.title: Oblivion
programme.desc: A security repairman stationed on a desolate future Earth rescues a beautiful stranger from a downed spacecraft. Her arrival will trigger a chain of events that will leave man's fate in his hands.

programme.title: Robin Hood (2010)
programme.desc: In an age of oppression and shameless tyranny, an outlaw becomes the unlikely hero that saves a nation and inspires generations to fight for freedom.

programme.title: Snakes on a Plane
programme.desc: FBI agent Flynn has to transport a witness, but as the plane reaches 30,000 feet, hundreds of deadly snakes are released, causing violent mayhem.

programme.title: Spider-Man
programme.desc: After a radioactive spider bite, a nerdy teen develops keen senses and amazing strength.

programme.title: The Dark Knight
programme.desc: A rising criminal mastermind known as The Joker thrusts Gotham into anarchy and forces Batman closer to crossing the fine line between hero and vigilante.

programme.title: Jack Reacher
programme.desc: A military cop becomes involved in a deadly game of cat-and-mouse when five people are randomly murdered by a sniper.

programme.title: Pineapple Express
programme.desc: A pothead who sees a crooked cop committing a murder goes on the run with his dealer.

programme.title: Starsky & Hutch
programme.desc: Join uptight David Starsky and laid-back Ken 'Hutch' Hutchinson as they're paired for the first time as undercover cops and are forced overcome their differences to solve an important case.

programme.title: Galaxy Quest
programme.desc: The alumni cast of a cult space TV show have to play their roles as the real thing when an alien race needs their help.

programme.title: Identity Thief
programme.desc: Unlimited funds have allowed Diana to live it up, but there's a glitch: she's financing her shopping with an ID stolen from Sandy Patterson, an accounts rep who lives halfway across the US.

programme.title: Last Vegas
programme.desc: When the group's sworn bachelor finally proposes to his thirty-something girlfriend, four friends head to Las Vegas with a plan to stop acting their age and relive their glory days.

programme.title: Dumb & Dumber
programme.desc: Lloyd and Harry. One's dumb, the other's dumber. Two dunderheads stumble across a briefcase full of ransom money for kidnappers linked to the Mob.

programme.title: Bad News Bears
programme.desc: Grizzled former professional baseball player Morris Buttermaker is recruited by a strait-laced lawyer to coach the Bears, a woefully inept Little League team.

programme.title: Daddy's Home 2
programme.desc: Having finally gotten used to each other's existence, Brad and Dusty must now deal with their intrusive fathers during the holidays.

programme.title: Little Nicky
programme.desc: When Satan refuses to retire, two of his heirs leave Hell for New York City to gather enough souls to vote the Prince of Darkness out of office.

programme.title: Horrible Bosses
programme.desc: Tormented by their self-centred and cruel employers, three friends see no way of escaping but to kill their bosses, but carrying out their plans proves to be trickier than they thought.

programme.title: Beetlejuice
programme.desc: What's a couple of stay-at-home ghosts to do when their beloved home is taken over by yuppies? They call on Beetlejuice, the afterlife's freelance bio-exorcist, to scare off the family.

programme.title: Zoolander
programme.desc: The misadventures of clueless model Derek Zoolander, who is hired to stop a cartel of political killers posing as male models.

programme.title: Dumb & Dumber
programme.desc: Lloyd and Harry. One's dumb, the other's dumber. Two dunderheads stumble across a briefcase full of ransom money for kidnappers linked to the Mob.

programme.title: Daddy's Home 2
programme.desc: Having finally gotten used to each other's existence, Brad and Dusty must now deal with their intrusive fathers during the holidays.

programme.title: Love Actually
programme.desc: Love's causing chaos all over London. Even the PM is smitten. Ten separate stories intertwine in a Christmas Eve climax.

programme.title: Duplicity
programme.desc: Two sexy spies-turned-corporate operatives find themselves on either side of an all-out corporate war, even though they are having an affair.

programme.title: Last Christmas
programme.desc: Featuring the music of George Michael, this film follows a hapless Londoner who works in a Christmas shop and becomes involved with a man who could be the answer to her problems.

programme.title: Pretty in Pink
programme.desc: She's a high school girl from the wrong side of town. He's the rich heartthrob who asks her to the prom. As fast as their romance builds, it's threatened by the painful reality of peer pressure.

programme.title: Blended
programme.desc: After a terrible blind date, two single parents and their kids find themselves stuck together on an African wildlife holiday where things go from bad to worse.

programme.title: 50 First Dates
programme.desc: Henry lives an enviable life in a Hawaiian paradise spending every night with a beautiful tourist in search of an island fling. It's a sweet life with no strings attached - until he meets Lucy.

programme.title: Just Go with It
programme.desc: Danny Maccabee meets the girl of his dreams but has to ask his loyal assistant to pretend to be his soon-to-be ex-wife in order to cover up a lie.

programme.title: Love Happens
programme.desc: A grieving self-help guru and a recently single florist's lives come crashing together at exactly the wrong time. Does love stand a chance?

programme.title: Intolerable Cruelty
programme.desc: A hilarious comedy about men, women, and everything that can go wrong between them. Sparks fly when divorce attorney Miles meets his match in the beautiful but ruthless Marylin.

programme.title: The Mirror Has Two Faces
programme.desc: Two best friends agree to an unconventional marriage built on intellectual passion instead of sexual heat. But when then fall in love, they realise they are courting chaos.

programme.title: Being John Malkovich
programme.desc: A depressed Craig Schwartz sells tickets to people so they can enter a portal into actor John Malkovich's mind.

programme.title: Minority Report
programme.desc: In the year 2054, the head of a police unit specialising in pre-crime - the arrest and conviction of murderers before they commit their crime - finds himself accused of a future murder.

programme.title: Fury
programme.desc: On a deadly mission behind enemy lines a wily WWII sergeant, his loyal Sherman tank crew and a rookie soldier find themselves hopelessly outnumbered.

programme.title: The Town
programme.desc: A bank robber falls in love with a former robbery hostage and decides he wants out of the life. With the Feds closing in he must choose: betray his friends or lose the woman he loves.

programme.title: Seven Years in Tibet
programme.desc: A true story of Heinrich Harrer, an Austrian mountain climber who became friends with the Dalai Lama at the time of China's takeover of Tibet.

programme.title: Catch Me If You Can
programme.desc: This is the extraordinary true story of a brilliant young master of deception and the FBI agent hot on his trail.

programme.title: Rocketman
programme.desc: The story of Elton John's life, from his years as a prodigy at the Royal Academy of Music, through his influential and enduring musical partnership with Bernie Taupin.

programme.title: The Da Vinci Code
programme.desc: A Harvard professor implicated in a murder must unravel an ancient code to expose the greatest conspiracy in history.

programme.title: The Bourne Identity
programme.desc: Pulled from the sea, Jason Bourne discovers he has the skills of a very dangerous man and no memory of his past.

programme.title: Nymphomaniac: Vol 1
programme.desc: Lars Von Trier's Nymphomaniac is the wild and poetic two-part story of a woman's journey from birth to the age of fifty.

programme.desc: A true story of Heinrich Harrer, an Austrian mountain climber who became friends with the Dalai Lama at the time of China's takeover of Tibet.

programme.title: Jaws 2
programme.desc: Just when you thought it was safe to go back in the water, another shark terrorises the resort of Amity as it recovers from the first man-eater. Police Chief Brody returns to kill.

programme.title: Trading Places
programme.desc: A story of a down-and-out con artist who trades lifestyles with a well-to-do investor. Two wealthy power players set the wheels turning with a crazy bet and the comedy gets richer by the minute.

programme.title: The Game
programme.desc: Run by the shadowy Consumer Recreations Services, the Game never quite declares its rules or objectives, but soon Nicholas finds himself in its grasp, and his ordered life starts to fall apart.

programme.title: Lethal Weapon
programme.desc: A veteran cop gets a suicidal partner. They have one thing in common: they hate working in pairs. But if these two can stand each other, the bad guys don't stand a chance.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch Movie
programme.desc: America's grooviest family are back in this big-screen adaptation of the long-running television series. The Bradys must save their home from foreclosure after a tax delinquency notice.

programme.title: The Nutty Professor
programme.desc: An eccentric chemistry professor discovers an elixir which turns him into a pop idol.

programme.title: Bird on a Wire
programme.desc: Hiding under the FBI witness protection program, a man gets nervous when an old flame recognises him. The two then find themselves thrown together on an exhilarating, cross-country odyssey.

programme.title: Casino
programme.desc: Greed, deception, money and murder envelop two mobsters and a devious trophy wife running a Las Vegas casino.

programme.title: Unforgiven
programme.desc: Retired Old West gunslinger William Munny reluctantly takes on one last job, with the help of his old partner and a young man.

programme.title: U.S. Marshals
programme.desc: Marshal Gerard leads the hunt by initiating a hard-target search for a fugitive in an ever-widening perimeter. This film is packed with suspense, action and daring twists.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch Movie
programme.desc: America's grooviest family are back in this big-screen adaptation of the long-running television series. The Bradys must save their home from foreclosure after a tax delinquency notice.

programme.title: The Nutty Professor
programme.desc: An eccentric chemistry professor discovers an elixir which turns him into a pop idol.

programme.title: Bird on a Wire
programme.desc: Hiding under the FBI witness protection program, a man gets nervous when an old flame recognises him. The two then find themselves thrown together on an exhilarating, cross-country odyssey.

programme.title: Road Trip Hostage
programme.desc: A deranged criminal forces a young woman to drive him across the country.

programme.title: Your Boyfriend Is Mine
programme.desc: Over the objection of his girlfriend, Ben agrees to take a job as the live-in manservant to a wealthy businesswoman, Amanda, but quickly realises he has made a deal with the devil.

programme.title: One Night Stand Murder
programme.desc: Alyssa wakes up in a home that's not hers and discovers a dead body. With no memory of how she got there and no idea of who the body belongs to, Alyssa tries to piece together what happened.

programme.title: No One Would Tell
programme.desc: Laura is happy for her daughter Sarah when she begins to date the popular boy from school, Rob. It is only a matter of time before Rob begins to reveal his darker, more possessive side.

programme.title: Silent Night, Fatal Night
programme.desc: When best-selling mystery author Mallory Dearborn decides to end her long-running detective franchise, her unhinged manager takes her prisoner and forces her to write a new novel during the holidays.

programme.title: I Was Octomom
programme.desc: In 2009, Natalie Suleman gives birth to eight children with the help of IVF, only to have her life torn apart, and her identity rebranded by the media.

programme.title: Cruise Ship Murder
programme.desc: After her aunt is found dead, having mysteriously fallen overboard on a cruise ship, Olivia is thrown into rough seas as her uncle's secret past is brought to life and more deaths occur.

programme.title: The Killing Game
programme.desc: Ten years after her daughter's murder, Eve is contacted by a man claiming to be the child's killer, who taunts her with mysterious clues and threats to kill again.

programme.title: Mommy Meanest
programme.desc: A teenage girl is relentlessly cyber-bullied, only to find out the horrific texts are from her own mother.

programme.title: A Daughter's Nightmare
programme.desc: Soon after her father's death, college freshman Ariel learns her mother, Dana, has met Adam, a seemingly well-meaning and charming man at a grief support group.

programme.title: Trapped in the Rocky Mountains
programme.desc: Lured into an unwelcome reunion at a vacant ski lodge, former college friends find themselves in a fight for their lives when they become the target of an unseen adversary.

programme.title: Sisters
programme.desc: A reporter who witnesses a brutal murder becomes entangled in a mystery involving conjoined twins who were separated at birth.

programme.title: Britney Ever After
programme.desc: The true story of Britney Jean Spears, one of the bestselling teenage music artists of all-time, whose dating life and public emotional breakdowns were the subjects of a worldwide media frenzy.

programme.title: The Killer Inside: The Ruth Finley Story
programme.desc: The kidnapping and sudden reappearance of Ruth Finley leave investigators scrambling for answers.

programme.title: A Lifeguard's Obsession
programme.desc: When a lonely, awkward lifeguard saves a well-known woman from drowning, he believes he's earned a place in her life and in her heart.

programme.title: Couples Retreat Murder
programme.desc: Becky and Jim head to a remote couple's retreat to try and save their marriage. However, when a guest goes missing and their host is found dead, they start to wonder who else they're trapped with.

programme.title: Queen of the Desert
programme.desc: A chronicle of Gertrude Bell's life, a traveller, writer, archaeologist, explorer, cartographer, and political attache for the British Empire at the dawn of the twentieth century.

programme.title: Raging Grace
programme.desc: An undocumented Filipino immigrant takes a job as a caretaker for a terminally ill man in a lavish home, securing a better future for her family, but a dark discovery threatens to destroy everything.

programme.title: Ammonite
programme.desc: In 1840s England, acclaimed but overlooked fossil hunter Mary Anning and a young woman sent to convalesce by the sea develop an intense relationship, altering both of their lives forever.

programme.title: Le Week-End
programme.desc: A long-married couple revisit Paris for a long weekend for the first time since their honeymoon, in hopes of rekindling their relationship - or, perhaps, to bring it to an end.

programme.title: The Happy Prince
programme.desc: After being imprisoned in England for his love affair with Lord Alfred Bosie Douglas, Oscar Wilde is penniless and in poor health, stumbling the streets of Paris.

programme.title: The Railway Man
programme.desc: The captivating, true story of a man who discovers the Japanese officer who tortured him during the war is still alive, and sets out to confront him.

programme.title: Suffragette
programme.desc: In early 20th-century Britain, a young working mother joins a diverse group of women who fight for equality and the right to vote.

programme.title: Brooklyn
programme.desc: An Irish immigrant lands in 1950s Brooklyn, where she falls in love with a local. But when her past catches up with her, she must choose between two countries.

programme.title: McClaren
programme.desc: The story of Bruce McLaren, the New Zealander who showed the world that a man of humble beginnings could take on the elite of motor racing and win.

programme.title: Coriolanus
programme.desc: After being banished from Rome, a revered and feared Roman General allies himself with his sworn enemy to take his revenge on the city.

programme.title: Churchill
programme.desc: A ticking-clock thriller following Winston Churchill in the 96 hours before D-day.

programme.title: Oranges and Sunshine
programme.desc: A powerful true story about a social worker who risks all in her effort to reunite families torn apart by a heartless government policy.

programme.title: Mothering Sunday
programme.desc: In 1924, housemaid and foundling Jane Fairchild has the rare chance to spend quality time with her secret lover, but unforeseen events will change the course of Jane's life forever.

programme.title: Breathe
programme.desc: The inspiring true love story of Robin and Diana Cavendish, an adventurous couple who refuse to give up in the face of a devastating disease.

programme.title: Once Around the Sun
programme.desc: A look at the musical acts who performed at Australia's first rock festival, The Pilgrimage For Pop Festival, at Ourimbah in 1970.

programme.title: Heartbreak High
programme.desc: A new student arrives with a bad reputation; Katerina learns about discipline.

programme.title: Dating the Enemy
programme.desc: Two lovers switch bodies. He's confronted with fashion fetish and monthly cycles, she finds that being cool and handsome is no picnic.

programme.title: Travelling North
programme.desc: After their late-life marriage, a middle-aged Australian couple move to the countryside. Their life and tempestuous marriage is detailed.

programme.title: Skippy
programme.desc: When Sonny befriends a couple on their honeymoon in the National Park, the wife takes a real shine to Skippy. Soon it becomes clear she wants more from Skippy than friendship.

programme.title: Ship to Shore
programme.desc: When Geraldine finds a suspicious object on Seal Island, there is a race to claim a piece of what is thought to be a priceless dinosaur egg.

programme.title: Heartbreak High
programme.desc: Strange things happen on a spooky Friday the 13th.

programme.title: The Chant of Jimmie Blacksmith
programme.desc: The true story of a part aboriginal man who finds the pressure of adapting to white culture intolerable, and as a result snaps in a violent and horrific manner.

programme.title: The Rats of Tobruk
programme.desc: Anzacs wage a long and courageous resistance to Nazi invasion during World War II.

programme.title: The Horseman
programme.desc: A man grieving the death of his daughter sets off on a road trip through the Australian outback where he befriends a young girl and commits a devastating killing spree.

programme.desc: Insane sadistic hermit stalks and captures those who get lost in his part of the woods. A young woman whose car breaks down is about to find out what he does with them next.

programme.desc: Sonny gets his birthday wish when he flies with Jerry in the helicopter, but it takes an unexpected turn.

programme.desc: A look behind the life of the first Indigenous Australian film star, and how he became an iconic actor in Australian cinema.

programme.desc: There's a marauding, indestructible creature that can rip a man in half and destroy a homestead in seconds and it is hell bent on terrorising the small isolated community of Gamulla.
