programme.title: I Still Believe
programme.desc: One love can change your life. One life can change the world. Rediscover the wonder of love in I STILL BELIEVE, based on the real-life story of chart-topping singer Jeremy Camp.

programme.title: Billy Graham Classics
programme.desc: Billy Graham teaches about that still small voice. Mark 6 (Memphis 1978).

programme.title: GGC Life TV
programme.sub-title: The World Outside Your Window Pt-1
programme.desc: With a vision for a church that is life-changing and uplifting, Glorious Gospel Church and their values are based firmly in the bible.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: The Power Of Right Believing Pt 1 of 3
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Lessons From The Bible
programme.desc: Join Pastor Doug, Dusty, Amelia and all the characters as they learn about the Bible and how it applies to daily life. Games, songs, and some silly puppets will inspire kids.

programme.title: Connect
programme.desc: A school theatre group aspires to stage every book of the Bible. The kids have questions and an ever-expanding cast of surprising and often bizarre visitors is on hand to help them navigate their journey through the scriptures.

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin
programme.sub-title: How to Redeem Your Family Name Series - Part 1
programme.desc: Pastor Jentezen Franklin, brings meaning to spiritual truths found in God's Word. Kingdom Connection is the teaching ministry of Free Chapel, a multi-campus church.

programme.title: The Christian View
programme.desc: A fast-paced, high-energy half-hour show with a panel of sharp, well-educated, quick-witted women and men - and the occasional guest co-host - discussing today's hot topics and headlines from a Biblical perspective.

programme.title: At the Table
programme.desc: Real women, real conversations, real issues. It's where you'll find information on family, health and spirituality, but most of all, a community doing motherhood together.

programme.title: The Restoration Road
programme.desc: As we travel this side of life, none of us arrive anywhere by accident. We choose, think, pray, and feel our way to our destination. Our inner GPS guides us to one of two places: destruction or restoration.

programme.title: Bible Discovery TV
programme.desc: Hosted by the Hembree family, this is a daily devotional show where Rod, Janice, Ryan and Corie walk you through the Word in a way that will forever change how you read, learn and experience the Bible.

programme.title: Answers with Bayless Conley
programme.sub-title: The Lord Is My Shepherd Part 1
programme.desc: In part one of his message The Lord Is My Shepherd, Pastor Bayless looks at Psalm 23, explaining the deep care your Good Shepherd provides you.

programme.title: Katherine Ruonala Ministries
programme.desc: What is the Kingdom of God? My daughter, Emily Ruonala, takes a deep dive to uncover the truth about what this really means for our lives.

programme.title: The 700 Club
programme.desc: A daily program with news, interviews, lifestyle features and true-life stories from a Christian perspective, including powerful and dramatic testimonies of God touching people's lives.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Are anger and strife affecting your life? Today, Joyce shares on the importance of letting go of offence and embracing a life filled with peace.

programme.title: In Touch
programme.desc: Tackling important life issues such as personal crises and relationships, Dr Stanley fervently believes the Bible to be the inerrant Word of God, a belief strongly reflected in his teaching.

programme.title: Destined to Ride
programme.desc: A young girl and her friend team up against two local boys on an epic horseback riding adventure in the country.

programme.title: Live @ Psalter Studios
programme.desc: Docu-music series featuring an array of Christian musicians including such artists as Josh Cunningham (The Waifs), Anna Weatherup and Castles In Air, an Indie Rock band from California.

programme.title: Jeni: Seeking the Extraordinary
programme.desc: Jeni and Casey are back this time road-tripping around the Pacific North West, seeing the sights, and meeting extraordinary people along the way.

programme.title: Bible Man
programme.desc: Miles Peterson had everything: Money, power, fame. Until he lost it. Then Miles finds the power of God and harnesses that power to become Bibleman.

programme.title: Sea Kids
programme.desc: The Sea Kids will help transform the heart and mind of every child as they learn how to tangibly live out biblical principles and build a strong foundation in Jesus.

programme.title: Holy Moly
programme.desc: This program turns the Bible into a living, breathing colouring book that will delight children of all ages. The series focuses on the Biblical characters' actions and emotions.

programme.title: The Blello Show
programme.desc: Join Kyle, Lyds, Extra Bear, and Stu as they share with you some cool vids, catchy catch phrases crazy challenges, things you can do in three minutes, and other random stuff to make your life awesome.

programme.title: Elevation Experience
programme.desc: The Elevation Experience with Pastor Steven Furtick features inspirational messages from Pastor Steven as well as original worship music from Elevation Church in Charlotte, North Carolina.

programme.title: A Moment in History
programme.desc: Join host Seth Udinski as he explores the most pivotal moments in history and the Bible, providing insight into the events that have shaped our world.

programme.title: Faith Runs Deep
programme.desc: In this new program from the producers of the award-winning series, Jesus the Game Changer, host Karl Faase travels around Australia in an iconic Holden ute, discovering a rich and inspiring history of faith.

programme.title: Drive Thru History: Ends of the Earth
programme.desc: Ends of the Earth takes viewers on a 19-episode, global trek to every corner of the earth, to show how God has used ordinary people throughout history to take His saving grace to every nation and people.

programme.title: Good Guys Doing Good
programme.desc: Tim Bisagno sets out on a journey across the USA to find men of God serving the Lord in adventurous, exciting and unique ways. Follow Tim as he travels, participates, laughs, cries, honours and showcases Good Guys doing Gods work!

programme.title: Miraculous Victories of Israel
programme.desc: What happens when the God of Israel intervenes in the battles of His people? Miraculous victories occur - victories that are sometimes inexplicable and often unbelievable.

programme.title: Bible Land Passages
programme.sub-title: Treasures of Qumran - The Dead Sea Scrolls
programme.desc: Read about places like Beersheba, Jericho, Jerusalem, Caesarea, and cities surrounding the Sea of Galilee, and discover that those places exist just as the Bible describes.

programme.title: The Incredible Journey
programme.sub-title: Just As I Am: A Journey of Faith and Redemption - Charlotte Elliot
programme.desc: Gary Kent is passionate about sharing the good news of Christ and preparing people for the soon coming of Jesus, offering Biblical answers to life's questions.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: The Power Of Right Believing Pt 2 of 3
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Direct from Houston, Texas, join Joel and Victoria Osteen and the team from Lakewood Church for a session of powerful music and empowering preaching.

programme.title: The Way of the Master
programme.desc: Is baptism required for salvation? What about death bed confessions?

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Are anger and strife affecting your life? Today, Joyce shares on the importance of letting go of offence and embracing a life filled with peace.

programme.title: A Marriage Made in Heaven
programme.desc: It appears Demetri Chicopoulos is living a charmed life, but he has lost his mother and recently gone through a divorce. In a prayerful moment Demetri asks God if he could just relive one week of his life.

programme.title: Tending Clouds
programme.desc: The extraordinary life of Reaksmey, sold to a pedophile by her mother and rescued by an anti-trafficking organisation. With her past behind her, Reaksmey is now moving back to her homeland of Cambodia determined to help others like her.

programme.title: Power for Living
programme.desc: Powerful words from Evangelist and Pastor Bill Newman.

programme.title: In Touch
programme.desc: Tackling important life issues such as parenting, finances, personal crises, emotions and relationships, Dr Stanley believes the Bible to be the Word of God, a belief reflected in his teaching.

programme.title: David Pawson
programme.sub-title: The Biblical Attitude to Money Pt1
programme.desc: Why was the Bible written? UK theologian, Cambridge scholar, pastor and Bible teacher, David Pawson explores scripture and discovers some hidden gems.

programme.title: Bottled With Love
programme.desc: After being stood up, Abbey gets inspired to open her heart in a letter, put it in a bottle and toss it out to sea. Months later, a man fishing discovers it and opts to reach out.

programme.title: Piece by Piece
programme.desc: LEGO bricks tell the life story of singer, songwriter and record producer Pharrell Williams - from his childhood in Virginia to his success in the music and fashion industry.

programme.title: The Three Musketeers: D'artagnan
programme.desc: France. D'Artagnan arrives in Paris trying to find his attackers after being left for dead, which leads him to a real war where the future of France is at stake.

programme.title: Hypnotic
programme.desc: Determined to find his missing daughter, Austin detective Danny Rourke finds himself spiralling down a rabbit hole while investigating a series of reality-bending bank robberies.

programme.title: Drive-Away Dolls
programme.desc: Free-spirited Jamie and her demure friend, Marian, embark on a road trip to Tallahassee for a fresh start, but things go wrong when they meet inept criminals along the way.

programme.title: MaXXXine
programme.desc: Adult film star and aspiring actress Maxine Minx finally gets her big break. However, as a mysterious killer stalks the starlets of LA, a trail of blood threatens to reveal her sinister past.

programme.title: Smile 2
programme.desc: As global pop star Skye Riley preps for a world tour, she faces terrifying events and the pressures of fame, pushing her to confront her haunting past.

programme.title: Night Swim
programme.desc: Former baseball player Ray Waller moves into a new home with his family. But a dark secret in the home's past will unleash a malevolent force that will drag the family into the depths of terror.

programme.title: AfrAId
programme.desc: The Curtis family tests a new digital assistant, AIA, which learns their behaviours and anticipates needs. But AIA's protective nature means nothing, or no one, will interfere with them.

programme.title: Madame Web
programme.desc: After showing signs of clairvoyance, New York City paramedic Cassandra Webb must confront revelations about her past and protect three young women from a mysterious adversary who wants them dead.

programme.title: Firebrand
programme.desc: Katherine Parr, Henry VIII's sixth wife, becomes regent while he battles abroad. When he returns sick and paranoid, she must fight for her survival.

programme.title: Emilia Perez
programme.desc: Follows four women in Mexico chasing happiness. Cartel leader Emilia recruits lawyer Rita to fake her death and live authentically as her true self.

programme.title: Cassino in Ischia
programme.desc: Nic Cassino goes to Italy to work with struggling Italian directors on the first-ever "Neo-Realist" action movie in an effort to revitalize his career.

programme.title: Greatest Days
programme.desc: A feature adaption of "The Band" musical, featuring songs of Take That.

programme.title: Freud's Last Session
programme.desc: On the eve of World War II, Sigmund Freud and C S Lewis gather to discuss the existence of God and the future of mankind.

programme.title: The Prince Of Egypt: The Musical
programme.desc: A live stage recording of the musical based on DreamWorks Animation's 1998 film adapted from the biblical story of Moses.

programme.title: The Prince of Egypt
programme.desc: This is the extraordinary tale of two brothers, one born of royal blood, one an orphan with a secret past. Their final confrontation will forever change their lives - and the world.

programme.title: Yesterday
programme.desc: After a freak accident, struggling singer-songwriter Jack realises he's the only person on Earth who remembers The Beatles. Performing their classics, he skyrockets to fame.

programme.title: Mamma Mia! Here We Go Again
programme.desc: A decade after Mamma Mia! sang and danced its way into the hearts of audiences around the world, the original cast are back.

programme.title: Rocketman
programme.desc: The story of Elton John's life, from his years as a prodigy at the Royal Academy of Music, through his influential and enduring musical partnership with Bernie Taupin.

programme.title: Footloose (1984)
programme.desc: In this beloved classic, a Chicago teen ends up in a town where dancing is banned by the local preacher. He then teams up with the preacher's daughter and gets everyone dancin'.

programme.title: Piece by Piece
programme.desc: LEGO bricks tell the life story of singer, songwriter and record producer Pharrell Williams - from his childhood in Virginia to his success in the music and fashion industry.

programme.title: Honey: Rise Up And Dance
programme.desc: An aspiring and determined street dancer comes out of the shadow of her trained dancer sister, and joins a dance competition to win the prize of a college scholarship.

programme.title: Burlesque
programme.desc: In this visually stunning musical, a small-town singer moves to the big city for her chance at stardom and becomes enchanted by Burlesque, a glamorous nightclub.

programme.title: Wicked
programme.desc: In Oz, two clashing witches, Elphaba and Glinda, form an unlikely friendship. Elphaba, wrongly labeled wicked, seeks to expose the corrupt Wizard ruling the land.

programme.title: Pitch Perfect 3
programme.desc: After the highs of winning the World Champs, the Bellas found themselves split apart and jobless. But when they get their chance for one last tour, they come together again.

programme.title: The Wedding Singer
programme.desc: It's 1985 and Adam Sandler is Robbie Hart, the ultimate master of ceremonies, until he is left at the altar at his own wedding.

programme.title: Bee Gees: Broken Heart
programme.desc: An exploration of the history of the Bee Gees, featuring revealing interviews with oldest brother Barry Gibb, and archival interviews with the late twin brothers Robin and Maurice.

programme.title: Trolls
programme.desc: When Troll Village is invaded by the Bergens, two mismatched trolls must try and tolerate each other as they set out on a journey to rescue their friends.

programme.title: Hop
programme.desc: An egg emergency ensues when the rock 'n' roll-loving teen son of the Easter Bunny shirks his responsibility and runs away from home.

programme.title: Pixels
programme.desc: When aliens discover video feeds of classic arcade games and misinterpret them as a declaration of war, they attack the Earth, using the video games as models for their assaults.

programme.title: Babe
programme.desc: A piglet won by a farmer in a raffle is raised by a sheepdog as one of her own and becomes a champion sheep-herder.

programme.title: The Swan Princess: A Royal Wedding
programme.desc: Join Princess Odette, Prince Derek and their royal friends as they set sail for another magical adventure in the enchanted land of Cathay.

programme.title: Jumanji
programme.desc: Two kids playing a magic jungle board game release a man trapped in it for 26 years, and a host of dangers that can only be stopped by finishing the game.

programme.title: Paddington
programme.desc: When a Peruvian bear travels to London in search of a home, he finds himself lost and alone at Paddington Station. This charming family comedy is based on the classic children's books.

programme.title: Paddington 2
programme.desc: Now happily settled with the Brown family, Paddington picks up a series of odd jobs to buy the perfect present for his Aunt Lucy's 100th birthday, only for the gift to be stolen.

programme.title: Christmas with the Kranks
programme.desc: Fed up with the commercial aspects of Christmas, the Kranks decide to skip Christmas this year and forgo the gifts, the tree, the decorations and to spend the dollars saved on a Caribbean cruise.

programme.title: Cloudy with a Chance of Meatballs 2
programme.desc: Flint thought he saved the world when he destroyed his infamous invention but he soon learns that the machine survived and has created 'foodimals'! Now he is on a mission to save the world - again!

programme.title: Tad The Lost Explorer
programme.desc: Due to a fortuitous mix-up, Tad, a dreamy construction worker, is mistaken for a famous archaeologist and sent on an expedition to Peru.

programme.title: Penguins of Madagascar
programme.desc: Recruited from youngsters into the global spy game, four penguins are called into action by a mysterious espionage organisation in order to save the world from a villainous octopus.

programme.title: Dinosaur Train: Adventure Island
programme.desc: Dinosaur siblings Buddy, Tiny, Shiny and Don try to reunite with their parents after an earthquake causes theme park robots to go rogue.

programme.title: Nanny McPhee
programme.desc: Move over, Mary Poppins. Nanny McPhee is a wonderfully hideous, mysterious nanny hired to tame seven brats with a feckless father.

programme.title: Dr. Seuss' the Lorax
programme.desc: A young boy searches for the one thing that will enable him to win the affection of the girl of his dreams. He must discover the story of the Lorax, the creature who fights to protect his world.

programme.title: Smurfs: The Lost Village
programme.desc: A mysterious map sets Smurfette and her friends on a thrilling race through the Forbidden Forest to find a mysterious lost village before the evil wizard Gargamel does.

programme.title: The Munsters
programme.desc: From Rob Zombie comes the strangest love story ever told as Herman and Lily's crazy courtship takes The Munsters on a hauntingly hilarious trip from Transylvania to Hollywood.

programme.title: Jack Reacher
programme.desc: A military cop becomes involved in a deadly game of cat-and-mouse when five people are randomly murdered by a sniper.

programme.title: The Accountant
programme.desc: A math savant with more affinity for numbers than people works as a freelance accountant for some of the world's most dangerous criminal organisations.

programme.title: Batman Begins
programme.desc: Bruce Wayne returns to Gotham and unveils his alter-ego: Batman, a masked crusader who uses his strength, intellect, and high-tech deceptions to fight the sinister forces that threaten the city.

programme.title: Geostorm
programme.desc: A system of satellites designed to protect the earth from natural disasters starts to malfunction, but who is responsible and can it be stopped?

programme.title: Interstellar
programme.desc: As life on Earth grinds to a halt, a team of explorers and astronauts travel through a wormhole and across the galaxy to discover whether mankind has a future among the stars.

programme.title: The Mummy (1999)
programme.desc: Archaeologists awaken an Egyptian priest mummified alive 36 centuries ago for killing Pharaoh Seti and sleeping with his mistress. When he escapes from the tomb, he becomes a threat to the world.

programme.title: Venom
programme.desc: When Eddie Brock acquires the powers of a Symbiote, he will have to release his alter-ego 'Venom' to save his life.

programme.title: The Meg
programme.desc: Deep-sea rescue diver Jonas must confront his fears to save a crew trapped on the ocean floor in a submersible that's been attacked by a massive creature.

programme.title: Scream 2
programme.desc: Two years after the tragic events that plagued Sidney she's moved to college putting the shocking killings behind her. That is until a copycat killer begins acting out a real-life sequel.

programme.title: The Amazing Spider-Man 2
programme.desc: Spider-Man's greatest battle begins when an evil corporation attempts world domination by deploying an army of super villains to crush Peter Parker.

programme.title: Machete
programme.desc: Left for dead after clashing with notorious Mexican drug kingpin Torrez, Machete escapes to Texas, looking to disappear and forget his tragic past. What he finds is a web of corruption and deceit.

programme.title: Men in Black II
programme.desc: J and K return as the secretive agents who 'out' aliens. When a dangerous one lands, disguised as an irresistible model, they have to save humanity once again.

programme.title: Daddy's Home 2
programme.desc: Having finally gotten used to each other's existence, Brad and Dusty must now deal with their intrusive fathers during the holidays.

programme.title: Little Nicky
programme.desc: When Satan refuses to retire, two of his heirs leave Hell for New York City to gather enough souls to vote the Prince of Darkness out of office.

programme.title: Horrible Bosses
programme.desc: Tormented by their self-centred and cruel employers, three friends see no way of escaping but to kill their bosses, but carrying out their plans proves to be trickier than they thought.

programme.title: Beetlejuice
programme.desc: What's a couple of stay-at-home ghosts to do when their beloved home is taken over by yuppies? They call on Beetlejuice, the afterlife's freelance bio-exorcist, to scare off the family.

programme.title: Knocked Up
programme.desc: A one-night stand between a mismatched slacker and a career girl results in a pregnancy that leads to unlikely mutual support.

programme.title: Couples Retreat
programme.desc: Four bickering couples embark on a journey to a tropical island resort. While one of the couples is there to work on their marriage, the other three set out to enjoy some fun in the sun.

programme.title: Dolittle
programme.desc: The eccentric Dr Dolittle sets sail on an epic adventure to a mythical island, regaining his wit and courage as he crosses old adversaries and discovers wondrous creatures.

programme.title: The Dilemma
programme.desc: A man finds out that his best friend and business partner's wife may be cheating, plunging him into the moral dilemma of deciding whether to tell his friend. Comic mayhem ensues.

programme.title: Holmes & Watson
programme.desc: Holmes and Watson join forces to solve a murder at Buckingham Palace. They soon realise that they only have 5760 minutes to solve the case, or the Queen will be next.

programme.title: Ghostbusters
programme.desc: Armed with proton packs and a new range of kick-ass weapons, the Ghostbusters battle to save the city from an uprising of mischievous ghouls.

programme.title: Ghostbusters: Afterlife
programme.desc: When a single mother and her two kids arrive in a small town, they begin to discover their connection to the original Ghostbusters and the secret legacy their grandfather left behind.

programme.title: How to Live Your Best Death
programme.desc: Hoping to go after her dreams, Kristin hires Ashley, a life coach who promises to help her reach her full potential. However, things take a turn when unconventional methods start to wreak havoc,

programme.title: Dying For A Crown
programme.desc: A new student at a high school stops at nothing to gain popularity and become homecoming queen at the prom.

programme.desc: A ticking-clock thriller following Winston Churchill in the 96 hours before D-day.

programme.desc: Earth is covered with water and the human race struggles to survive on dilapidated boats and makeshift floating cities.

programme.desc: A friend encourages Monica to start a crowdsource fund to pay for her daughter's hospital bills. However, when a seemingly generous man donates more and more money, she begins to question his motives.

programme.title: Girl in the Basement
programme.desc: Sara, a vibrant teen, was looking forward to her 18th birthday so she could move away from her controlling father. But before she could even blow out the candles, her world became extremely dark.

programme.title: Kidnapping in the Grand Canyon
programme.desc: Two best friends hiking the Grand Canyon trust a hiking guide to take them on an off trail adventure.

programme.title: Murder At The Lighthouse
programme.desc: Fleeing her abusive ex, Jess hires a boat to Canada, but when it sinks, she's rescued by a reclusive lighthouse keeper. As she heals, Jess realises she's fallen into another trap.

programme.title: A Kidnapping in Amish Country
programme.desc: When an Amish woman discovers her daughter has been kidnapped, she turns to the only person who can help her estranged best friend, who has left the Amish way of life.

programme.title: The Killer I Picked Up
programme.desc: A hardworking single mother takes a side job as a rideshare driver to help pay for her daughter's college tuition. Things take a dark turn when she encounters a mysterious passenger.

programme.title: Wife Stalker
programme.desc: Joanna's obsessive fantasy of a perfect life with Leo shatters, forcing her to confront harsh reality and the truth about their relationship, with dire consequences.

programme.title: Abducted In The Everglades
programme.desc: A college student vanishes during spring break in Miami. Her mother, with help from a local boatman, braves dangers to urgently search for her and unravel the mystery.

programme.title: Cheerleader Nightmare

programme.title: The Podcast Murders
programme.desc: A true crime podcast host achieves massive success for her investigation of the serial killing case she calls the Barbie Murders. But her anonymity isn't the only thing being threatened.

programme.title: The Perfect Boyfriend
programme.desc: After struggling through a painful divorce, April decides to get back into the dating game and is swept off her feet by the handsome Jacob, who is hiding a dark side and a wife.

programme.title: Revenge For My Mother

programme.title: Slumber
programme.desc: Alice is a sleep doctor, haunted by the nocturnal death of her brother. While examining a family with sleep problems, she is forced to accept they're being terrorised by a demon.

programme.title: Answers with Bayless Conley
programme.sub-title: The Lord Is My Shepherd Part 1
programme.desc: In part one of his message The Lord Is My Shepherd, Pastor Bayless looks at Psalm 23, explaining the deep care your Good Shepherd provides you.

programme.title: PowerPoint with Jack Graham
programme.desc: A vision of Dr Jack Graham to glorify God by introducing Jesus Christ as Lord to as many people as possible and to develop them in Christian living.

programme.title: The Catholic Guy
programme.sub-title: Defining The Path to Deeper Holiness (2)
programme.desc: Bruce Downes is the Catholic Guy. His presentations will uplift, inform and challenge you to move to higher level of faith and life.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: The Power Of Right Believing Pt 3 of 3
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Veggie Tales
programme.desc: In these two stories, kids learn that God is bigger than the boogie-man, and can even close the mouths of lions!

programme.title: Deditos
programme.desc: This quirky kids show introduces children to classic stories from the Old Testament using finger puppets.

programme.title: New Horizons
programme.sub-title: Life Hacks: Pocket tips from the Book of Proverbs Pt7
programme.desc: Marc explores the wisdom of the Book of Proverbs looking at the wisdom that God has provided, so that we can observe it and put it into practice in our day to day lives.

programme.title: Canada Out Of Doors
programme.desc: Highlights the adventures of Northern Ontario tourism outfitter and seaplane pilot Joel Theriault from Air Ivanhoe. A blend of flying, exploring, construction and renovations, camp life, hunting, and cooking of wild game.

programme.title: Faith Runs Deep
programme.desc: In this new program from the producers of the award-winning series, Jesus the Game Changer, host Karl Faase travels around Australia in an iconic Holden ute, discovering a rich and inspiring history of faith.

programme.title: Jeni: Seeking the Extraordinary
programme.desc: Jeni and Casey are back this time road-tripping around the Pacific North West, seeing the sights, and meeting extraordinary people along the way.

programme.title: Be That
programme.desc: Daniel Flynn is co-founder and managing director of Thankyou, a brand which saw success and notoriety. But as public success grew, Daniel's fear of failure became something he couldn't ignore.

programme.title: Elevation Experience
programme.desc: The Elevation Experience with Pastor Steven Furtick features inspirational messages from Pastor Steven as well as original worship music from Elevation Church in Charlotte, North Carolina.

programme.title: Life with Paul De Jong
programme.desc: We like to call it 'soul food'. This program uses creative illustration, real life stories and biblical teaching to encourage and help viewers discover a greater purpose to their lives.

programme.title: Drive Thru History
programme.desc: Dave Stotts explores the amazing lives of the first Christians. Using the Book of Acts as a roadmap, Dave travels the Mediterranean region to share the people, and events that launched the Christian faith.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Are you missing the good things in life because you're constantly worried? Today, Joyce shares the key to enjoying life and how to let go and wholly trust in God!

programme.title: Convocation
programme.desc: Weekly Liberty University Campus Convocation services connect students with their Creator through passionate worship and powerful messages firmly rooted in Biblical truth.

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: Rosemary's newspaper article creates waves when she questions Lucas's judgement. Allie discusses her birth father with Nathan, and Elizabeth realises Little Jack is growing up.

programme.title: Welcome to Hope
programme.desc: John gets his life back on track thanks to Jude and Pastor Luke, until an unthinkable family tragedy occurs.

programme.title: Breath of Life
programme.desc: Breath of Life features leading voices from the worlds of faith and creativity. A profound new series that reveals what it means to be made in God's image and how to inhale the living breath of God.

programme.title: Dot Conner: Webtective
programme.desc: Follows an inquisitive young teenager as she investigates questions about faith as if she is a detective solving a mystery. Dot's cases unfold through the lens of social media and technology.

programme.title: Little Worship Company
programme.desc: Hal, Mr and Mrs Looyah present this Bible- and worship-based series. For children up to 7 years old, ALIVE is all about God's fantastic promise to be by our side, always.

programme.title: Owlegories
programme.desc: Owlegories is an animated series that follows a group of student owls as they travel on adventures learning about nature, faith, and God!

programme.title: Superbook
programme.desc: Join in the incredible adventures of Christopher and Joy. An ancient book they found by chance transfers the heroes through the ages back to the times of biblical events.

programme.title: Friends and Heroes
programme.desc: Friends and Heroes is an animated children's adventure based in Ancient Egypt, Israel and Rome. The story follows two young friends Macky and Portia as they fight for justice against the Roman Empire.

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin
programme.sub-title: How to Redeem Your Family Name Series - Part 1
programme.desc: Pastor Jentezen Franklin, brings meaning to spiritual truths found in God's Word. Kingdom Connection is the teaching ministry of Free Chapel, a multi-campus church.

programme.title: Centuries Collide
programme.sub-title: St. Valentine - The OG of Love
programme.desc: There are so many legends surrounding St. Valentine that he almost borders on the mythological. We go to Rome to discover why we celebrate his day every year and why his legend has survived nearly 2000 years!

programme.title: TV4DADs
programme.desc: In Season 6 of the program, Brian teams up with his daughter Jeni (from Jeni:Seeking the Extraordinary) for an adventure in Florida that sees them catching fish, throwing axes, and being ambushed by killer birds.

programme.title: View & Chew
programme.desc: This show wouldn't be complete without some eats on the street, so grab a seat and take a sneak peek at some sweet treats and tasty meats from West to East.

programme.title: Be Great. Do Good
programme.desc: When a business is new, it's not strange that all decisions need to be made by the key business leader. However, as the business grows, that leader may begin feeling tired, lonely and without hope.

programme.title: Compassion Stories
programme.desc: Follow powerful stories highlighting the transformative work of the Compassion Child Sponsorship Program in Africa, South America, India and Asia.

programme.title: A Cathedral Pilgrimage
programme.desc: A Pilgrimage through Britain's Great Cathedrals explores cathedrals & abbeys found throughout England & Wales, featuring interviews with historians & experts & breathtaking footage.

programme.title: The Good Road
programme.desc: Discover Music City's true history through Jefferson St. before it was erased by I-40.

programme.title: Planetshakers TV
programme.desc: Russell and Sam Evans are the senior pastors of Planetshakers City Church, with a mission to 'empower a generation to win a generation' and Planetshakers TV showcases weekly teaching and music.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Speak Out By Faith And Win Pt 1 of 3
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: A Moment in History
programme.desc: Join host Seth Udinski as he explores the most pivotal moments in history and the Bible, providing insight into the events that have shaped our world.

programme.title: Katherine Ruonala Ministries
programme.desc: What is the Kingdom of God? My daughter, Emily Ruonala, takes a deep dive to uncover the truth about what this really means for our lives.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Are you missing the good things in life because you're constantly worried? Today, Joyce shares the key to enjoying life and how to let go and wholly trust in God!

programme.title: An Easter Bloom
programme.desc: A young gardener sets out to save her family farm by entering a floral competition for Easter. She meets a local pastor along the way who helps her restore the hope she lost.

programme.title: Fly Away Home
programme.desc: The story of a 13-year-old girl who goes to live with her estranged, eccentric father following the death of her mother. She finds renewed happiness when she adopts an orphaned flock of baby geese.

programme.title: Noble
programme.desc: Christina Noble overcomes the harsh difficulties of her childhood in Ireland to discover her destiny on the streets of Saigon. A true story.

programme.title: The Caine Mutiny Court-Martial
programme.desc: A naval officer stands trial for mutiny after taking command from a ship captain he feels is acting in an unstable way, putting in danger both the ship and its crew.

programme.title: Kill
programme.desc: During a train trip to New Delhi, a pair of commandos face an army of invading bandits.

programme.title: Rumours
programme.desc: Leaders of the wealthiest democracies face absurd challenges as night falls in misty woods, realising they are suddenly alone and struggling with their incompetence.

programme.title: Tuesday
programme.desc: A mother and her teenage daughter must confront Death when it arrives in the form of an astonishing talking bird.

programme.title: Test: AUS v Windies: 1984/85 1st Test
programme.desc: The summer of 1984/85 ignites as the invincible West Indies, spearheaded by Michael Holding's lightning pace, arrive on Australian shores. Can Terry Alderman and the Australians withstand this opening onslaught?

programme.title: Test: AUS v Windies: 1984/85 2nd Test
programme.desc: Australia strives to find answers against the seemingly unstoppable West Indies.

programme.title: Test: AUS v Windies: 1984/85 3rd Test
programme.desc: Australia seeks a breakthrough in the 1984 series. While Lawson probes with the ball, Wessels digs deep with the bat. Can they find an answer to the relentless brilliance of Malcolm Marshall and the West Indies?

programme.title: Test: AUS v Windies: 1984/85 4th Test
programme.desc: The Boxing Day Test of 1984. Andrew Hilditch stands firm for Australia, but the power of Viv Richards and the West Indies' fearsome attack loom large.

programme.title: Test: AUS v Windies: 1984/85 5th Test
programme.desc: The 1984-85 series culminates. Bob Holland's spin aims to outwit the mighty West Indies. Can Kepler Wessels inspire Australia to a memorable end against one of cricket's greatest teams?

programme.title: Test: AUS v Windies: 2009/10 2nd Test
programme.desc: With the series opener in their favour, Australia braces for a West Indies fightback. Can Chris Gayle inspire a turnaround against the formidable Australian attack?

programme.desc: England and India return to Edgbaston after their infamous 2022 Test, where the home side chased down a target of 378 runs in the final innings.

programme.desc: England has only won two of their last five Tests at Edgbaston. The third day against India begins.

programme.title: Test ENG v IND: 2nd Test Day 4
programme.desc: In India's previous eight visits to Edgbaston for a Test, they've failed to register a win. Day four begins.

programme.title: Test ENG v IND: 2nd Test Day 5
programme.desc: The second Test between England and India concludes from Edgbaston.
